title: Close button minimizes instead of quitting - HideWindowOnClose config
Configure macOS build - app icon, Info.plist, dock integration
close_reason: macOS build configured - app name 'Surge', Info.plist with bundle ID com.wails.Surge, version 0.1.0, Surge pixel-art logo as app icon (.icns), clean build to Surge.app

title: Setup Go backend - embed Surge engine, create App struct with Wails bindings
notes: Cannot import surge internal packages from outside module. Switching to HTTP API client approach - spawn surge server as subprocess and communicate via HTTP API on port 1700.
close_reason: Go backend implemented with HTTP API client approach. Spawns surge server as subprocess, communicates via HTTP API, streams SSE events to Wails frontend. Build passes.

title: HTTP API keepalive - start HTTP server for browser extension support
close_reason: HTTP API compatibility handled natively - Wails app spawns surge server which already serves HTTP API on port 1700

title: Build Svelte frontend UI - dashboard, progress bars, add download
close_reason: Svelte frontend UI built - premium dark cyberpunk theme with Outfit+JetBrains Mono typography, download dashboard, progress bars with shimmer animation, SSE event wiring, add URL dialog, toast notifications. Frontend builds clean, full Wails build passes.

title: Wire events - Surge events to Wails EventsEmit to Svelte
close_reason: SSE event streaming implemented in app.go - connects to surge /events SSE endpoint, parses events, and dispatches via Wails EventsEmit with surge: prefix
